chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-417 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of CMA 1817/23 3.For hearing of main case 13-10-2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. **** None is present on behalf of the petitioner, nor any is intimation received. This is the second call at 11:30 a.m. Even on the last date of hearing, counsel for the petitioner was not in attendance and the brief was held on his behalf, which shows that the petitioner and his counsel are not interested in pursuing this petition. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with the listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
